summary: Contract review for task-003 build+bundle+verify. Demo steps map 1:1 to AC1-7. TTY hang sim (Step 8) uses spawnSync with 1s timeout and asserts non-zero exit without SIGTERM, distinguishing self-exit from kill. Three stdin forms (pipe/heredoc/redirection) exercised in Steps 5-7. Bundle grep whitelist correctly names event log --data, context write --data, packet create --file/--content. Edge cases cover trailing-space grep, single-quoted heredoc, mktemp scratch, mtime sanity. Approve.
concerns: low/stdin-smoke: Step 5 asserts exit 0 and spec.json existence but not content round-trip from piped JSON — non-blocking nice-to-have for AC6.
low/tty-sim: spawnSync stdio[0]=inherit under a test runner inherits a pipe not a real TTY; validates non-hang on empty stdin but not isatty() path. Acceptable since no-hang is the requirement.
